title: Interferon Signaling and Checkpoint Resistance
abstract: Tumor interferon signaling can shape checkpoint inhibitor response and resistance. Biomarker panels benefit from combining transcriptomic signatures with immune-cell context.

title: Kinase Escape Mutations in Targeted Therapy
abstract: Secondary kinase-domain mutations may reduce drug binding. Evidence maps should connect mutation prevalence, assay sensitivity, and compound selectivity.

title: Inflammatory Bowel Disease Cytokine Axes
abstract: IL-23 and TNF pathways remain central intervention axes. Patient stratification requires integrating biomarkers, tissue context, and longitudinal response.

title: ADME Liability Signals in Early Discovery
abstract: Clearance, permeability, and solubility findings should be linked to structural alerts and assay transfer notes before advancing analogs.
